inputs.titre: Creation of the International Women's League

reason: The image depicts a group of women, dressed in suits and hats typical of the early 20th century, gathered in what appears to be a formal meeting. The architectural details, including the heavy draperies, chandelier, and wall sconces, suggest a palatial interior appropriate for the time period. There are no immediately visible anachronisms or fantastical elements. The women's clothing and general atmosphere align well with the 1915 setting of the 'Creation of the International Women's League'. The lighting and film style (lack of colour) seems to match the era.
